headlines.description: — Matthew Boyd pitched six shutout innings, Alex Bregman drove in two runs and the Chicago Cubs beat the Baltimore Orioles 5-2 Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cubs left-hander Matthew Boyd blanks Orioles over 6 innings in 5-2 victory
